name: Chocolate Coffee Torte
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Coffee liqueur or cold strong coffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl. Mix well.
2. Press half of the crumb mixture firmly onto the bottom of a 9-1/2-inch (24 cm) springform pan.
3. Melt the chocolate and sweetened condensed milk together on low heat, stirring until smooth.
4. Add the sour cream, coffee liqueur (or cold strong coffee), and melted chocolate mixture to the bowl. Mix well.
5. Beat the whipping cream to stiff peaks. Reserve a small amount for decoration. Gently fold in the remaining whipped cream into the chocolate mixture.
6. Spread half of the filling over the prepared crust.
7. Top with the remaining crumb mixture.
8. Spread the remaining filling on top.
9. Chill until firm, about 4 hours or overnight. Decorate with reserved whipped cream and chocolate-covered coffee beans.
10. Serve with raspberry sauce if desired.
Preparation time: 15 minutes
Makes: 12 servings
